description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a broad, open terrace area. Large glass windows run along the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property includes a spacious swimming pool adjacent to the main building, with a paved deck area for relaxation. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout emphasizes open space, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, a spacious terrace, and an adjacent swimming pool, featuring minimalist concrete and metal construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the house, the large pool, and the two main building volumes with flat roofs.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the main entrance area, the pool in the foreground, and the smaller building volume to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long facade with extensive windows and the pool area set between the two building volumes.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the house, the pool, and the terrace area, with both building volumes visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is understated with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass doors, emphasizing openness and minimalism.
